zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Canne於1575年出生在英國諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Canne25歲，母親Rebecca Plowman15歲。她於1602年10月17日與Thomas Clarke Sr.在英國諾福爾可班納姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1642年5月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆享年67歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Canne于1575年出生在英国諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas Canne25岁，母亲Rebecca Plowman15岁。她于1602年10月17日与Thomas Clarke Sr.在英国諾福爾可班納姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1642年5月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆享年67岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Canne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (mainly Naples): from the medieval personal name Cante (a short form of Cavalcante ) or a nickname derived from cantare ‘to sing’.
Hispanic (mainly Guatemala, Mexico, and Colombia): possibly of Italian origin (see 1 above).
In some cases also an Italianized form of Slovenian   Kante  .

variants.name: Cavalcante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Marcos, Claudio, Francisco, Gustavo, Lito, Orlando.  Italian Sal.
Italian: from a medieval personal name derived from cavalcare ‘to ride’, from Latin caballicare.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Canne was born in 1575, in Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England, her father, Thomas Canne, was 25 and her mother, Rebecca Plowman, was 15. She married Thomas Clarke Sr. on 17 October 1602, in Banham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 22 May 1642, in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67, and was buried in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Canne est née en 1575, à Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Canne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Plowman, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Clarke Sr. le 17 octobre 1602, à Banham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mai 1642, à Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Lei sposato Thomas Clarke Sr. il 17 ottobre 1602, nel Banham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Mary Canneが1575年にイギリスノーフォルクオルド ブクエンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Canneは25歳，母Rebecca Plowmanは15歳であった。1602年10月17日にイギリスノーフォルクバンハムでThomas Clarke Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1642年5月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーデドハムで67歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Dedham, Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함 데드함
ko.Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함
ko.Old Village Cemetary, Dedham, Massachuse: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Canne(이)가 1575년 영국 노르폴크 드 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Canne(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rebecca Plowman(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1602년 10월 17일 영국 노르폴크 반함에서 Thomas Clarke Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1642년 5월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Canne nasceu em 1575, em Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Canne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Plowman, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Clarke Sr. em 17 de outubro de 1602, em Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de maio de 1642, em Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Canne родилась в 1575 г. в местности олд буккенам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Canne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Plowman, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Clarke Sr. 17 октября 1602 г. в местности банам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 мая 1642 г. в местности дедхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности дедхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Canne nació en 1575, en Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Canne, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Rebecca Plowman, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Thomas Clarke Sr. el 17 de octubre de 1602, en Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1642, en Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
